name: Tuna Salad Sandwich
instructions: Mix tuna, mayo, and celery in a bowl.
Season with salt and pepper.
Serve on bread with lettuce.

name: Overnight Oats with Banana
instructions: Combine oats and milk in a jar; stir well.
Add mashed banana, peanut butter, and honey.
Refrigerate overnight and eat cold or warmed.

name: Chickpea Curry
instructions: Sauté onion and garlic in oil until soft.
Stir in curry powder, then add chickpeas and coconut milk.
Simmer 15 minutes; stir in spinach until wilted.

name: Shakshuka
instructions: Sauté onion and pepper in olive oil until soft.
Add tomatoes and cumin; simmer 10 minutes.
Make wells in the sauce, crack in eggs, cover, and cook until whites set.

name: Breakfast Burrito
instructions: Warm tortillas and scramble eggs with a pinch of salt.
Divide beans, eggs, and cheese among tortillas.
Top with salsa, roll tightly, and toast seam-side down in a pan.

name: Beef Tacos
instructions: Brown ground beef; drain fat and add taco seasoning with a splash of water.
Warm tortillas in a dry skillet.
Fill tortillas with beef, lettuce, tomato, and onion.

name: Greek Yogurt Parfait
instructions: Layer yogurt, granola, and berries in a glass or bowl.
Drizzle with honey.
Serve right away so granola stays crunchy.

name: Pad Thai
instructions: Soak noodles in hot water until tender; drain.
Scramble eggs in a pan; add noodles, peanut butter, soy sauce, and lime juice.
Toss with bean sprouts and green onions; serve warm.

name: Black Bean Soup
instructions: Sauté onion and garlic until fragrant.
Add beans, broth, and cumin; simmer 15 minutes.
Blend partially for texture; finish with lime juice and cilantro.

name: Coconut Rice with Mango
instructions: Rinse rice and cook with coconut milk, water, and sugar.
Let rice rest 10 minutes off heat.
Serve warm with fresh mango slices.

name: Sheet Pan Sausage and Veggies
instructions: Toss potatoes and broccoli with oil and seasoning on a sheet pan.
Roast at 425°F for 15 minutes.
Add sausages and roast 15 more minutes until everything is browned.

name: Egg Fried Noodles
instructions: Boil noodles until tender; drain.
Scramble eggs in a hot pan; add cabbage and noodles.
Season with soy sauce and toss with green onions.

name: Hummus and Veggie Cups
instructions: Portion hummus into small containers.
Pack vegetable sticks alongside for dipping.
Keep refrigerated until ready to eat.

name: One-Pot Chicken and Rice
instructions: Brown chicken in olive oil; remove and set aside.
Sauté onion, then add rice and broth.
Nestle chicken on top, cover, and simmer 20 minutes until rice is tender.

name: Banana Bread
instructions: Mash bananas and mix with melted butter.
Stir in sugar, egg, and vanilla.
Fold in dry ingredients and bake at 350°F for 50-60 minutes.

name: Veggie Pizza on Tortilla
instructions: Spread sauce on tortillas and top with cheese and vegetables.
Bake at 425°F for 8-10 minutes until cheese melts.
Slice and serve hot.

name: Peanut Butter Banana Smoothie
instructions: Add all ingredients to a blender.
Blend until smooth, adding ice if needed.
Serve immediately.

name: Kimchi Fried Rice
instructions: Heat sesame oil and stir-fry kimchi for 2 minutes.
Add rice and kimchi juice; toss until heated through.
Top with a fried egg and sliced green onions.

name: Caprese Sandwich
instructions: Slice roll and drizzle with olive oil.
Layer mozzarella, tomato, and basil.
Finish with balsamic glaze and a pinch of salt.

name: Microwave Mug Omelette
instructions: Whisk eggs with salt and pepper in a microwave-safe mug.
Stir in cheese, bell pepper, and onion.
Microwave on high for 60-90 seconds, stirring halfway, until set.

name: Chicken Caesar Salad
instructions: Chop romaine and toss with Caesar dressing.
Top with sliced chicken, Parmesan, and croutons.
Serve immediately.

name: Teriyaki Salmon Bowl
instructions: Pan-sear salmon skin-side down until crisp; flip and glaze with teriyaki.
Steam broccoli until bright green.
Serve salmon over rice with broccoli and sesame seeds.

name: Ramen Upgrade Bowl
instructions: Boil noodles with seasoning packets and frozen vegetables.
Soft-boil or poach eggs separately.
Top bowls with eggs, green onions, soy sauce, and sesame oil.

name: Spaghetti Aglio e Olio
instructions: Cook spaghetti in salted water until al dente; reserve 1/2 cup pasta water.
Gently cook garlic in olive oil until fragrant.
Toss pasta with garlic oil, pepper flakes, parsley, and pasta water.

name: Baked Mac and Cheese
instructions: Cook macaroni; drain.
Make a roux with butter and flour, whisk in milk until thickened.
Stir in cheese and mustard; combine with pasta and bake at 375°F for 20 minutes.

name: Chicken Quesadilla
instructions: Place cheese and chicken on one tortilla; top with second tortilla.
Cook in oiled skillet 2-3 minutes per side until cheese melts.
Cut into wedges and serve with salsa.

name: Spicy Roasted Chickpeas
instructions: Toss chickpeas with oil and spices.
Spread on a baking sheet in a single layer.
Roast at 400°F for 25-30 minutes, shaking pan halfway.

name: Pesto Pasta
instructions: Cook pasta until al dente; reserve 1/4 cup pasta water.
Toss pasta with pesto, tomatoes, and olive oil.
Add pasta water as needed and top with Parmesan.

name: Grilled Cheese and Tomato Soup
instructions: Butter bread and sandwich cheese between slices; grill until golden.

name: Avocado Toast with Egg
ingredients: Salt, pepper, and red pepper flakes
instructions: Toast bread until golden.

name: Open-Faced Garden Tartine
instructions: Toast bread until crisp.
Mix mayo with lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
Spread on toast and top with fresh lettuce.

name: Crispy Celery with Creamy Dip
instructions: Cut celery into long sticks and chill.
Whisk mayo with lemon juice, garlic powder, salt, and pepper.
Serve celery with the creamy dip on the side.

name: Savory Lemon Herb Toast
instructions: Toast bread until golden.
Stir lemon juice and garlic powder into the mayo.
Spread generously and finish with black pepper.

name: Garden Tomato Salad
instructions: Tear lettuce into a bowl and add tomato slices.
Whisk olive oil, lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
Toss and serve immediately.

name: Skillet Cheese Toast
instructions: Butter one side of each bread slice.
Layer cheese between slices and cook in a skillet over medium heat.
Flip once and cook until the cheese melts and the bread is golden.
Sprinkle with paprika and serve hot.

name: Skillet Garlic Bread
instructions: Mix softened butter with garlic, olive oil, parsley, and salt.
Spread on bread and cook in a skillet until crisp and fragrant.
Serve warm.

name: Honey Morning Porridge
instructions: Simmer oats, milk, and salt for 5 minutes, stirring often.
Remove from heat and stir in honey and cinnamon.
Serve warm.

name: Creamy Stovetop Oatmeal
instructions: Bring milk and salt to a gentle simmer.
Stir in oats and cook 5 minutes until creamy.
Off heat, stir in honey and vanilla.

name: Peanut Butter Toast
instructions: Toast bread until crisp.
Spread peanut butter and drizzle with honey.
Finish with a pinch of cinnamon.

name: Peanut Butter Banana Toast
instructions: Toast bread and spread with peanut butter.
Top with banana slices, honey, and cinnamon.
Serve immediately.

name: Rustic Tomato Soup
instructions: Sauté garlic in olive oil for 1 minute.
Add tomatoes and broth; simmer 12 minutes.
Stir in basil, season with salt and pepper, and serve.

name: Tomato Basil Salad
instructions: Combine tomatoes and torn basil in a bowl.
Whisk olive oil, lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
Toss and let sit 5 minutes before serving.

name: Garlic Herb Broth
instructions: Warm broth in a small pot with garlic and Italian seasoning.
Simmer 5 minutes, then stir in olive oil.
Season with salt and pepper and serve hot.

name: Garlic Lemon Rice
instructions: Warm rice in a pan with olive oil and garlic for 2 minutes.
Off heat, add lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
Fluff and serve.

name: Steamed Broccoli Florets
instructions: Steam broccoli until bright green and tender, about 4 minutes.
Toss with olive oil, garlic, lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
Serve warm.

name: Cheesy Black Bean Quesadilla
instructions: Mash beans lightly with cumin.
Spread beans and cheese on one tortilla; top with salsa and second tortilla.
Cook in a skillet 2 to 3 minutes per side until crisp and melted.
Slice and serve with extra salsa if desired.

name: Crispy Cheese Taco
instructions: Sprinkle cheese and cumin over one tortilla.
Add salsa, fold, and cook in a dry skillet until golden on both sides.
Cut into wedges and serve hot.

name: Mediterranean Crudités
instructions: Spread hummus in a bowl and swirl with olive oil.
Stir lemon juice through the center and sprinkle paprika on top.
Serve with crisp carrot sticks for dipping.

name: Sunny Eggs on Toast
instructions: Toast bread and fry eggs in butter to your liking.
Place an egg on each slice, season with salt, pepper, and paprika.
Serve immediately.

name: Tea Room Celery Sandwiches
instructions: Mix mayo, celery, lemon juice, salt, and pepper until well combined.
Spread on two bread slices and close with the remaining bread.
Trim crusts if desired, cut into small triangles, and serve chilled.

name: Weeknight Chicken Rice Bowl
instructions: Warm rice and chicken in a pan with olive oil and garlic.
Stir in soy sauce and cook 2 minutes until heated through.
Season with salt and pepper and serve in a bowl.

name: Easy Egg Fried Rice
instructions: Scramble eggs in hot oil, then remove from the pan.
Sauté garlic, add rice, and stir-fry 2 minutes.
Return eggs, add soy sauce and green onion, and toss to combine.
Season with salt and pepper and serve hot.

name: Grilled Tomato Melt
instructions: Layer tomato and cheese on bread; season tomato with salt, pepper, and garlic powder.
Butter the outside of the sandwich and grill until golden and melted.
Rest 1 minute, then slice and serve.

name: Mini Caprese Plate
instructions: Alternate tomato, mozzarella, and basil on a plate.
Drizzle with olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
Serve at room temperature.

name: Honey Greek Yogurt
instructions: Spoon yogurt into a bowl.
Drizzle with honey and swirl in vanilla and cinnamon.
Serve chilled.

name: Strawberry Yogurt Parfait
instructions: Layer yogurt, strawberries, and granola in a glass.
Drizzle honey over the top.
Serve immediately.

name: Cucumber Hummus Bites
instructions: Stir lemon juice into hummus and spread on a small plate.
Top with olive oil and paprika.
Serve with cucumber slices for scooping.

name: Light Tuna Lettuce Cups
instructions: Mix tuna, mayo, celery, lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
Spoon filling into lettuce cups.
Serve chilled.

name: Broccoli Rice Pilaf
instructions: Steam broccoli until tender.
Sauté garlic in olive oil, add rice and broccoli, and stir-fry 2 minutes.
Stir in soy sauce, season, and serve warm.

name: Teriyaki Glazed Rice
instructions: Warm rice in a pan with olive oil.
Add teriyaki sauce and toss until glossy.
Top with green onion and sesame seeds before serving.
